title: Particles Enhanced
body:
# ParticlesEnhanced
_2021's take at particles in Minecraft_

​

![particle fade](https://hypixel.net/attachments/ezgif-com-gif-maker-1-gif.2669239/)

​

Particles Enhanced is my new mod that superseeds better particles mod (it caused a lot of crashing)

​

You know that really old mod that makes it so sharpness particles always show up? This mod has that along with always critical particles as well! And, if you don't like being able to hit people who are invincible, I made a toggle for that too!
Along with that, a particle multiplier is also present so you can have up to 20x particles (and even disable them as well!)

​

All this is great but, it's not exactly original. So, I created a never-seen-before feature: Fade! Rather than particles just disappearing after a certain amount of time, now, they fade out to nothing smoothly too!

## Overview
**Particle Fade** - make particles fade out over time

**Particle Multiplier** - increase the amount of particles that are spawned

**Always Show Sharp Particles** - always spawn sharpness particles, even if you don't have a sharpness sword

**Always Show Crit Particles** - always spawn critical particles, even if you didn't get a critical hit

​

![settings page](https://hypixel.net/attachments/2021-07-23_13-26-png.2669246/)
![settings button](https://hypixel.net/attachments/2021-07-23_13-27-png.2669248/)
